prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: A horizontal processing pipeline with three stations labeled "validate", "transform", "save". A green item flows through all three stations successfully along the top path, arriving at a "Success" output. A second red item enters the pipeline but fails at station 2 "transform": an alarm goes off and the item drops through a trapdoor escape hatch, sliding down a red chute that bypasses station 3 entirely, landing in an "Error handled" zone below. The remaining stations have ghosted outlines for the failed item, showing they were skipped. Small arrows show the short-circuit path clearly.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
